arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka sparks injury fears as the Arsenal and England forward limps off in the second half against Greece
arts.sum: Saka limped off six minutes into the Nations League match at Wembley following a knock, with the England star replaced by Noni Madueke.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka reveals Mikel Arteta decision that left him 'speechless'
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is lost for words when it comes to reflecting on his role as Arsenal's captain in the absence of Martin Odegaard. When asked to sum up the importance of captaining Arsenal in an interview with CBS Sports this week, Saka said: "That's one of the things where I become speechless when people ask me.

arts.ttl: Greece celebrate record-breaking Wembley goal with touching George Baldock tribute
arts.sum: Greece opened the scoring against England in the Nations League on Thursday night and their squad paid tribute to the late George Baldock in their celebrations, a day after his tragic death

arts.ttl: England legend Geoff Hurst says team can win next World Cup with Guardiola or Klopp as manager
arts.sum: World Cup final hat-trick hero Sir Geoff Hurst, 82, thinks England has so much talent that 2026 could be the team’s year - with Pep Guardiola or Jurgen Klopp as manager

arts.ttl: Ian Wright delivers emotional tribute to George Baldock after Greece star's tragic death
arts.sum: George Baldock, who tragically died on Wednesday aged 31, played for MK Dons during Ian Wright's spell coaching at the club and the ex-Arsenal striker has paid tribute

arts.ttl: George Baldock drowned while swimming in the pool at his home in Athens, his family confirm
arts.sum: Greek police earlier said there was no evidence that criminal activity caused the death of the 31-year-old Greece international

arts.ttl: England and Greece pay emotional tribute to George Baldock after tragic death
arts.sum: Tributes were paid to George Baldock at Thursday's Nations League clash between England and Greece, with the fullback having earned 12 caps for the latter country before his death

arts.ttl: LIVE: England host Greece in the Nations League
arts.sum: Vangelis Pavlidis scores to put Greece 1-0 up in the Nations League match against England.

arts.ttl: Why England and Greece footballers are wearing black armbands in Wembley fixture
arts.sum: England, under the interim management of Lee Carsley, face Greece in the UEFA Nations League at Wembley on Thursday night, with the match going ahead following tragic circumstances

arts.ttl: Roy Keane explains why ‘brilliant’ Cole Palmer is a player ‘you’d pay to watch’
arts.sum: Palmer has reached double figures in England caps with his start against Greece
